title: Talent
subtitle: Manage and search your candidate database.

stats.totalDesc: Every candidate not manually archived. Matches what the table shows when the status filter is set to "All".
stats.completedDesc: Profile fully filled in and signed in within the last year. Same rule as the Completed badge in the table.
stats.not_activatedDesc: Bulk-uploaded SMP workers who haven't signed in yet, still inside the 30-day activation window. Drops out automatically after that.
stats.hiredDesc: Currently employed. Never auto-archives — employees use the mobile app, not the candidate portal.
stats.blockedDesc: Manually blocked by an admin. Cannot apply or be processed.
stats.archivedDesc: Hidden from active listings. Includes manually-archived rows and rows that have aged out (stale logins, never-finished individuals, expired SMP grace window). May exceed Total because manually-archived rows are not counted in Total.

search.ph: Search by ID, name, phone, email — or paste a list of IDs

multiSearch.pillTruncatedTitle: You pasted more than {{n}} identifiers — only the first {{n}} are searched.
multiSearch.missingDesc: These identifiers do not match any candidate in the current view. Adjust your filters or chase them down.
multiSearch.droppedFreeText: {{n}} non-ID entries were treated as free-text and ignored from the missing list.
multiSearch.allMatched: All {{n}} pasted IDs matched a candidate.

archivedReasonDesc.inactive_one_year: Has an account but hasn't signed in for over a year. Send a re-engagement SMS to nudge them back.
archivedReasonDesc.incomplete_profile: Self-signup never completed the profile wizard. They need to finish onboarding before they can be processed.
archivedReasonDesc.missed_activation: SMP worker never activated within the 30-day window. Resend the activation SMS to mint a fresh link.
archivedReasonDesc.manually_archived: An admin archived this candidate manually. Restore from the row menu if needed.

documentFilter.hasDriversLicenseTitle: Only show candidates whose driver's license is on file (catering vans, shuttle drivers).
documentFilter.hasVaccinationReportTitle: Only show candidates whose vaccination report is on file (food handling, healthcare-adjacent roles).

list.title: Candidate List
list.emptyHintMultiSearch: None of the pasted identifiers matched the current filters. Try clearing filters or check the missing-IDs panel above.
list.emptyHintUpload: Upload your candidate database to get started
list.emptyHintFiltered: No candidates match the selected filters

statusDefs.title: Status
statusDefs.completedDesc: Profile is fully filled in and the candidate has signed in within the last year.
statusDefs.not_activatedDesc: Bulk-uploaded SMP worker who hasn't signed in yet. Auto-archives after 30 days without activation.
statusDefs.hiredDesc: Currently employed. Never auto-archives — employees use the mobile app, not the candidate portal.
statusDefs.blockedDesc: Manually blocked by an admin. Cannot apply or be processed.
statusDefs.archivedDesc: Hidden from active listings. Catches stale profiles (no login in over a year), self-signups who never finished the wizard, SMP workers who never activated within 30 days, and anything an admin has manually archived.

smpToast.blockedByPipeline: Blocked: candidate has active pipeline records.
smpToast.noSmpSelected: Select SMP candidates to use this action.

bulkConfirm.descArchive: This will archive {{n}} candidate(s). They will be hidden from active listings but all their records (applications, interviews, onboarding) will be preserved. Archived candidates can be restored later.
bulkConfirm.descUnarchive: This will restore {{n}} archived candidate(s) and return them to active listings.
bulkConfirm.descBlock: This will block {{n}} candidate(s) from applying or being processed.
bulkConfirm.descUnblock: This will unblock {{n}} candidate(s), restoring their active status.

toast.invalidIbanDesc: IBAN must be SA followed by 22 digits (24 characters total)
toast.invalidIbanLengthDesc: Saudi IBANs are exactly 24 characters; you entered {{count}}.
toast.invalidIbanCharsDesc: IBAN may only contain digits after SA.
toast.invalidIbanChecksumDesc: IBAN checksum is invalid — please re-enter.

block.title: Block Candidate
block.desc: Are you sure you want to block
block.descSuffix: ? They will no longer appear in active candidate lists or be eligible for job applications.

archive.title: Archive Candidate
archive.desc: Are you sure you want to archive
archive.descSuffix: ? They will be hidden from active listings but all their records will be preserved.

profile.ibanInvalid: IBAN must be SA followed by 22 digits (24 chars total)

toast.smpDescDefault: {{created}} new, {{attached}} existing attached to SMP pipeline.

upload.title: Bulk Upload Candidates
upload.desc: Upload an Excel or CSV file to add candidates to the talent pool. Download the template to match the required format.
upload.drop: Click to select an Excel or CSV file
upload.validateHint: Click "Validate SMP Rows" to check for conflicts before uploading.
upload.newHeader: NEW ({{n}}) — Will be created fresh in the talent pool and added to SMP pipeline
upload.cleanDesc: {{name}} (ID: {{id}}) already exists. Confirming will include them under this SMP contract. Their existing profile and history will be preserved.
upload.blockedHint: Resolve this conflict outside the system and retry.
upload.noBlocked: ✓ No blocked rows. Ready to upload once all CLEAN rows are confirmed.
upload.noDataRows: No data rows found in file
upload.tooManyRows: File contains {{n}} rows. Maximum allowed is {{max}}.
upload.parseFail: Could not parse file. Please use the template.
upload.noSmpRowsDesc: Set the 'source' column to 'smp' for SMP workers.
upload.smpDescDefault: {{created}} new, {{attached}} existing attached to SMP pipeline.

reclassify.warning: This will fail if the worker has any active blockers (open application, scheduled interview, active workforce contract).

toSmp.title: Reclassify as SMP worker?
toSmp.body: {{name}} will be moved to the SMP workforce. If they have not activated yet, status resets to awaiting activation and a fresh activation SMS will be sent. Their portal experience will switch to SMP-mode (no IBAN, no CV, no Jobs tab).

toIndividual.title: Reclassify as Individual?
toIndividual.body: {{name}} will be moved back to the Individual talent pool. They lose access to SMP-only flows and the SMP company linkage will be cleared on their next workforce deployment.

reclassify.reasonPlaceholder: Explain why this worker is moving out of the SMP workforce…
reclassify.reasonHint: Required — recorded in the audit log (minimum 10 characters).
